history.content: Implemented exactly as approved in `src/gateway/prompt-context.ts` and built successfully. ### ✅ Changes made 1) **Removed intraday truncation in autonomous path** - Updated: - `const intradayNotes = ...trim().slice(-600) : '';` - To: - `const intradayNotes = ...trim() : '';` - Location: around line **397** 2) **Removed intraday truncation in interactive path** - Updated: - `const intradayNotes = ...trim().slice(-600) : '';` - To: - `const intradayNotes = ...trim() : '';` - Location: around line **425** 3) **Added TODAY_NOTES injection to Tier-2/3 parts array** - Inserted immediately after `[PROJECT_CONTEXT]` and before `[TOOLS]`: ```ts intradayNotes ? `[TODAY_NOTES — read-only context, do NOT call write_note unless you complete something meaningful this turn]\n${intradayNotes}` : '', ``` - Location: around line **487** ### ✅ Build result Ran exactly once as instructed: - `npm run build` - Result: **success** (`tsc`, exit code 0) ### Notes - No other logic was modified. - No files were created or deleted.
